_**User**_

I need to understand every place the string "pyx2ctune" appears in this codebase so I can plan a rename to "mctoolbox". 

Search the entire workspace for all occurrences of "pyx2ctune" in:
1. Python files (*.py) - imports, module references, logging names, string literals
2. YAML files (*.yaml, *.yml)
3. pyproject.toml
4. Any .md files
5. Any .mdc files (cursor rules)
6. Jupyter notebooks (*.ipynb)
7. Directory/folder names
8. Any other files

For each category, list the files and approximate count of occurrences. Also list any directories named "pyx2ctune" that would need renaming.

Be thorough - search for "pyx2ctune" as a literal string across ALL file types.
